en: Oh that you were like a brother to me who nursed at my mother's breasts! If I found you outside, I would kiss you, and none would despise me.
zh: 但願你像我的兄弟， 像吃我母親奶的兄弟。 這樣，我在外面遇見你，就可以吻你， 不會被人藐視。

en: I would lead you and bring you into the house of my mother- she who used to teach me. I would give you spiced wine to drink, the juice of my pomegranate.
zh: 我要引領你， 領你到我母親家裡去；從小她就教導我。 我要給你喝石榴汁釀的香酒。

en: His left hand is under my head, and his right hand embraces me!
zh: 他的左手托住我的頭， 他的右手擁抱著我。

en: I adjure you, O daughters of Jerusalem, that you not stir up or awaken love until it pleases.
zh: 耶路撒冷的眾女子啊！我懇求你們， 不要激動，不要挑動愛情， 等它自發吧。

en: Who is that coming up from the wilderness, leaning on her beloved? Under the apple tree I awakened you. There your mother was in labor with you; there she who bore you was in labor.
zh: 那從曠野上來， 靠在她愛人身旁的是誰呢？ 我在蘋果樹下喚醒了你； 在那裡你的母親懷了你； 在那裡生育你的為你受生產的痛苦。

en: Set me as a seal upon your heart, as a seal upon your arm, for love is strong as death, jealousy is fierce as the grave. Its flashes are flashes of fire, the very flame of the LORD.
zh: 求你把我放在你心上如印記， 把我帶在你臂上如戳印； 因為愛情像死亡一般的堅強； 嫉妒如陰間一般的堅穩； 它的烈燄是火的烈燄， 是非常猛烈的火燄。

en: Many waters cannot quench love, neither can floods drown it. If a man offered for love all the wealth of his house, he would be utterly despised.
zh: 愛情，眾水不能熄滅， 洪流不能淹沒； 如果有人拿自己家裡所有的財產去換取愛情， 就必被藐視。

en: We have a little sister, and she has no breasts. What shall we do for our sister on the day when she is spoken for?
zh: 我們有一個小妹妹， 她的兩乳還未發育完全； 有人來提親的時候， 我們當為她怎樣辦理呢？

en: If she is a wall, we will build on her a battlement of silver, but if she is a door, we will enclose her with boards of cedar.
zh: 她若是牆， 我們就要在她上面建造銀塔； 她若是門， 我們就要用香柏木板圍護她。

en: I was a wall, and my breasts were like towers; then I was in his eyes as one who finds peace.
zh: 我是牆，我的兩乳像其上的塔； 我在他的眼中像尋得安樂的人。

en: Solomon had a vineyard at Baal-hamon; he let out the vineyard to keepers; each one was to bring for its fruit a thousand pieces of silver.
zh: 所羅門在巴力．哈們有個葡萄園； 他把這葡萄園租給看守的人， 各人要為葡萄園所得的果子付一萬一千四百克銀子。

en: My vineyard, my very own, is before me; you, O Solomon, may have the thousand, and the keepers of the fruit two hundred.
zh: 我自己的葡萄園卻在我面前， 所羅門哪，一萬一千四百克歸給你， 二千二百八十克歸給那些看守果子的人。

en: O you who dwell in the gardens, with companions listening for your voice; let me hear it.
zh: 你這住在園中的啊！ 我的同伴都在細聽你的聲音； 願你使我也聽見。

en: Make haste, my beloved, and be like a gazelle or a young stag on the mountains of spices.
zh: 我的良人哪！願你快來， 像羚羊或小鹿， 在香草山上！
